title: cyclophorus longifolius
intro: Cyclophorus longifolius is a species of plant in the family Cyclophoraceae, commonly known as the long-leaf cyclophorus. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cyclophorus longifolius include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, which can help alleviate symptoms such as pain, swelling, and high body temperature. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
